title: Ugo Nwachuku - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Ugo Nwachuku - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Ugo Nwachuku
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’22
Vancouver Campus
Ugo Nwachuku credits his early achievements as a software engineer to his experience at Khoury College’s Vancouver campus. Initially trained as an electrical engineer, he believes that the diverse viewpoints he encountered from his fellow students helped equip him for the industry.
Just being here, I felt like I got the sense that I was getting prepared to join the industry and that’s what I’m seeing while I’m out there
Ugo Nwachuku, Align MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury Stories
